overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing first-person vehicle driving along scenic coastal highways, through mountain tunnels, and past construction zones with moderate traffic and clear sunny weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with ocean views and rocky cliffs

events.description: passing a white box truck traveling in the opposite direction
vehicle changes lanes to the right to follow the dark sedan

agents.ego_description: driving along the coastal highway following a dark sedan at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead in the same lane
white box truck traveling in the opposite direction

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face running parallel to the highway
blue ocean visible beyond the highway barrier
wooden utility poles with multiple power lines along the roadside
metal highway guardrail separating the lanes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along a sunny coastal highway with the ocean visible to the left and rocky cliffs to the right. Power lines run parallel to the road as the driver follows a dark sedan, occasionally passing oncoming traffic including a large white truck.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete highway tunnel with overhead lighting

events.description: entering the tunnel from the coastal highway, lighting changes to artificial
approaching the tunnel exit, natural light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel, following traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving in the left lane alongside

entered.detail: curved concrete tunnel ceiling with fluorescent light fixtures
smooth concrete tunnel wall with black and yellow directional arrows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a well-lit concrete tunnel, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting. The curved ceiling features fluorescent lights while the walls display directional arrows. A black SUV drives parallel in the left lane as the vehicle approaches the distant tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert mountain highway with distant mountain views

events.description: exiting the tunnel into open desert landscape with mountains visible
motorcyclist enters from the right and drives alongside the vehicle
approaching the gas station exit ramp on the right

agents.ego_description: cruising along the mountain highway, overtaking a motorcycle and approaching the gas station exit

notable_agents.action: motorcyclist in white jacket riding in the right lane
dark sedan continuing ahead on the highway

entered.detail: large mountain peak visible in the distance against the sky
roadside fuel station with tall price sign visible near the end of the segment
cluster of evergreen trees along the hillside

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel reveals a sweeping desert highway with Mount Chiliad visible in the distance. The vehicle passes a motorcyclist in a white jacket and continues past pine trees lining the hillside, approaching a gas station with a tall sign visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp with safety bollards

events.description: taking the exit ramp onto the elevated highway section
approaching the second tunnel entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: taking the exit ramp and accelerating on the elevated highway toward the second tunnel

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: row of bright yellow safety bollards dividing the highway lanes
arched concrete tunnel entrance approaching at the end of the ramp
solid concrete wall on the right side of the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes an exit ramp onto an elevated highway section marked by yellow safety bollards. A black sedan overtakes on the left as the vehicle approaches a second tunnel entrance, with concrete barriers lining the right side of the ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: second highway tunnel with concrete arch construction

events.description: entering the second tunnel with concrete arch ceiling
approaching the tunnel exit with daylight visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through the second tunnel maintaining steady speed behind other traffic

entered.detail: curved concrete arch ceiling with embedded lighting fixtures
metal grid structure at the tunnel exit for ventilation

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a second tunnel featuring a concrete arch ceiling with embedded lighting. The tunnel is relatively short, with a ventilation grate visible at the far end as the vehicle approaches the exit back into daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with active construction zone on the right

events.description: exiting the tunnel into a construction zone with barriers on the right

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and navigating past construction barriers on the right side

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: orange and white striped plastic barriers lining the construction zone
temporary construction fencing behind the barriers

segments.scene_description: Exiting the second tunnel, the vehicle enters a highway construction zone marked by orange and white striped barriers on the right. The vehicle follows a white box truck as it navigates the final stretch of road with construction fencing visible along the hillside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a sunny coastal highway through a series of tunnels and into a highway construction zone. It begins along a bright shoreline with the ocean to the left and rocky cliffs to the right, following a dark sedan past oncoming trucks. The scene then shifts as the vehicle enters a well-lit concrete tunnel with fluorescent lighting, moving parallel to a black SUV before emerging into a sweeping desert landscape with Mount Chiliad in the distance. As the vehicle passes a motorcyclist and a roadside gas station, it takes an exit ramp marked by yellow bollards and enters a second, shorter tunnel with an arched ceiling. Finally, the camera exits back into the daylight, navigating a construction zone defined by orange and white striped barriers and fencing while following a white box truck.
